name: Listing Prospect V2
description: 30 profils/jour (15 KDM seniors + 15 Community juniors, 15F+15M). Dedup via Google Sheet. Scoring repensé : KDM = Head of/VP/Director/C-level scale-up, Community = alternants/étudiants/juniors grandes écoles.

assignments.name: qKDM_1
assignments.value: site:linkedin.com/in ("Head of" OR "VP" OR "Director" OR "Directeur" OR "Directrice") ("Growth" OR "Marketing" OR "Sales" OR "Revenue" OR "Product") (startup OR SaaS OR tech OR AI OR fintech) (France OR Paris)

assignments.name: qKDM_2
assignments.value: site:linkedin.com/in ("CEO" OR "CTO" OR "COO" OR "CPO") ("scale-up" OR "Series B" OR "Series C" OR ETI OR fintech OR licorne) (France OR Paris OR Lyon OR Bordeaux)

assignments.name: qKDM_3
assignments.value: site:linkedin.com/in ("Managing Director" OR "Country Manager" OR "General Manager" OR "DGA" OR "Directeur General" OR "Directrice Generale") (tech OR digital OR AI OR transformation) France

assignments.name: qComm_1
assignments.value: site:linkedin.com/in (alternant OR alternance OR stagiaire OR apprenti OR apprentie) ("data" OR "growth" OR "digital" OR "marketing" OR "GTM" OR "no-code") (HEC OR ESSEC OR ESCP OR Polytechnique OR emlyon OR EDHEC OR SKEMA) France

assignments.name: qComm_2
assignments.value: site:linkedin.com/in (etudiant OR etudiante OR student OR "M2" OR "Master 2" OR junior OR debutant) ("growth" OR "data" OR "digital" OR "GTM" OR "automation" OR "no-code") (INSA OR Epitech OR Efrei OR Kedge OR NEOMA OR Audencia) France

assignments.name: qComm_3
assignments.value: site:linkedin.com/in ("promo 2024" OR "promo 2025" OR "promo 2026" OR "class of 2025" OR "class of 2026" OR "jeune diplome") ("data" OR "growth" OR "marketing digital" OR "product" OR "analytics") France

assignments.name: fixedNote
assignments.value: Fraichement arrive sur Paris pour passer quelque annees a construire ma carriere apres des belles annees a surfer autour du globe. Juste la pour etoffer mon cercle. Au plaisir de suivre vos activites

parameters.subject: ={{ "Prospects LinkedIn " + $json.dateStr + " — " + $json.totalProfiles + " profils (KDM: " + $json.kdmCount + " | Comm: " + $json.commCount + " | F: " + $json.femaleCount + " | H: " + $json.maleCount + " | Score: " + $json.avgScore + "/10)" }}
parameters.message:
={{ "

Bonjour Victor,

" + $json.totalProfiles + " profils LinkedIn du " + $json.dateStr + " :

  • KDM (seniors scale-up) : " + $json.kdmCount + "
  • Community (juniors grandes ecoles) : " + $json.commCount + "
  • Femmes : " + $json.femaleCount + " | Hommes : " + $json.maleCount + "
  • Score moyen : " + $json.avgScore + "/10

CSV en piece jointe. Feuille Google Sheets mise a jour (dedup automatique).

" }}

parameters.subject: ={{ "Prospects LinkedIn " + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] + " — Aucun nouveau profil" }}
parameters.message: Tous les profils disponibles ont deja ete traites. Verifiez les queries ou attendez de nouveaux profils LinkedIn.
